    - Task Specific | papers: db25332718d65f3298465ab0ded77cd5f58bc527; bf58d6c697efd49d9ae7ad042c4bf41142f1be59; ea2f2fa4a7336d0d99dafe912ed43538d29da09b; 677a7a940dcff639bd066f25b395a361a08a60f9; 916f8ae4dad6ee8a23e50c3fb0729a31aed17f2d; a99f26f191dc3d93ad611c84db5ce8d272595355; ebfb4521c2ebb26a821050469cf5de8c1a7e0992; cf5842442f24cbadb3ce2a766dc98976440167fb; a3e95c1fbc78a6962e8977a5e10beb84f533b11a; a7a30c1e233991b20bfb0d23e53fdb9f9a72e5cd; d8a842014e2679569b69db07bc0bfd0d3022aa0e; 2e79a816ff94a62efe1b1b2cee30c42da187d33f; f4db6705fd899eaf54f700c0bfcea8801ab52a1b; 1236ed56fbc5e8d0d9905627a15a3406d50a4d54; 7fbd5e5cabec5a576fdbaa023809c9552bd0134a; 3047fcf2183d93ba4253494acac42fb609fe99b7; 83cd70c87825e5295ed3dd6eeb57add7ccd82dce; c1a2a16a5ba8b082677e9e4de7d6c113cd0f3d2c; 078de8a6e93c7679fd82bd4527681b2ff1963e25; 2cad84f86b4632b356642c2c3ac799cc94383e0c; f07735d82c7013310be496faba964d785199528d; 614877d185999ca70166d7d1e5d0e0081eabfc3e; b60387e929fadc5c02039411600d79e1fb02cb44; 153912627157e73462d0f7b77df682be87ecdfc6; 51c2e8b2a85c23ac89561b238c0512f0413a5cd9; e04cbbcf11e5b442af85f23ff10db6f74405db2a; f704ff871e1eb5d61c3ca2be39c9b1e171a49e76; 7ba02123df5c2601d52a138da519939d7ccf62e8; 818cd97e72f85659c87da37b14458c30bc0b501e; 0bac11c3e354e2909f17cd6f0472c009abab2cc7; ea3162754bb2698e4b2fde0debd0541c333f14ad; 6442d9609a1efc4a6bbac4bb47a6f39b985f32ee; 2b66a0d8a00b0ba7b585e11ab34879420ad351cb; b6ea823efc131c8a061ccaab9df7ee9aec746c21; b6f4877861be9a40711763394d8f5f0377ad1a8f; 12fd25d437bf4c81d95da678b8369fb7dd238f4c; 9782cdf9838991c96018b01d5184c40dc1b06068; 029e9ef47d4a6cfb80fc44c14ef5e858ef28c82d; 48f819855ebcb7fc2ac0b9a825f91e23c1c83286
      - Continual Finetuning | papers: db25332718d65f3298465ab0ded77cd5f58bc527; bf58d6c697efd49d9ae7ad042c4bf41142f1be59; ea2f2fa4a7336d0d99dafe912ed43538d29da09b; 677a7a940dcff639bd066f25b395a361a08a60f9; 916f8ae4dad6ee8a23e50c3fb0729a31aed17f2d; a99f26f191dc3d93ad611c84db5ce8d272595355; ebfb4521c2ebb26a821050469cf5de8c1a7e0992; cf5842442f24cbadb3ce2a766dc98976440167fb; a3e95c1fbc78a6962e8977a5e10beb84f533b11a; 2cad84f86b4632b356642c2c3ac799cc94383e0c; f07735d82c7013310be496faba964d785199528d; 614877d185999ca70166d7d1e5d0e0081eabfc3e; b60387e929fadc5c02039411600d79e1fb02cb44; 153912627157e73462d0f7b77df682be87ecdfc6; 0bac11c3e354e2909f17cd6f0472c009abab2cc7; ea3162754bb2698e4b2fde0debd0541c333f14ad; 6442d9609a1efc4a6bbac4bb47a6f39b985f32ee; 2b66a0d8a00b0ba7b585e11ab34879420ad351cb; b6ea823efc131c8a061ccaab9df7ee9aec746c21; b6f4877861be9a40711763394d8f5f0377ad1a8f; 12fd25d437bf4c81d95da678b8369fb7dd238f4c; 9782cdf9838991c96018b01d5184c40dc1b06068; 029e9ef47d4a6cfb80fc44c14ef5e858ef28c82d; 48f819855ebcb7fc2ac0b9a825f91e23c1c83286; d0a21c79996815953f933286d848f11eca42f097; b3f98f5baf3b7239ce0da45147bda4c4154fac9c; 62be538a25a6ca7ebf1b1ac9f338ad01fdc481fb; 879c7942118b781645d183b05ba9a1b6986133fd; 796084a51330777cce4e013726e1b5eba0410cc3; fa133b4200729a57db96ae50aff8c4a5ff819f43; 7021719e050356ddd2f58f40d66e7bab3457ec8c; 1cb37e155e3414ff7774c6c91e72699c35d971c7; 3161e2b6787d304c29dddb7d5fc188ca41be7bda; 28fde851680a40fbbc5c6a44bd3ac6f5ca4ad284; 76b65c248677314865a110424542c220886dbb67; 8d474304a985bfbe838ed3e068710cfb86ead2cf; 560b1bc012588731b26748e33236570df777baa0; f727f928e7e179307d8d4a1da2387393f2bd7915; a9be51698e7c2247853b7b6f1f70fc4d6d7ef605; dfbbc9373a575fb3031cd195c7aa616e183f0b60; d1b5151231a790c7a60f620e21860593dae9a1c5; 6f8c4311e65efebb9da5a542c0405684e82a77cc; 0e0e706e13f160e74cac9556f28ab9a358c148d2; ccae9fcb1f344e56a3f7cb05a4b49a6e658f9dd2;   - Task Agnostic | papers: d0a21c79996815953f933286d848f11eca42f097; b3f98f5baf3b7239ce0da45147bda4c4154fac9c; 62be538a25a6ca7ebf1b1ac9f338ad01fdc481fb; 879c7942118b781645d183b05ba9a1b6986133fd; 796084a51330777cce4e013726e1b5eba0410cc3; fa133b4200729a57db96ae50aff8c4a5ff819f43; 7021719e050356ddd2f58f40d66e7bab3457ec8c; 1cb37e155e3414ff7774c6c91e72699c35d971c7; 3161e2b6787d304c29dddb7d5fc188ca41be7bda; 28fde851680a40fbbc5c6a44bd3ac6f5ca4ad284; 76b65c248677314865a110424542c220886dbb67; 8d474304a985bfbe838ed3e068710cfb86ead2cf; 560b1bc012588731b26748e33236570df777baa0; f727f928e7e179307d8d4a1da2387393f2bd7915; a9be51698e7c2247853b7b6f1f70fc4d6d7ef605; dfbbc9373a575fb3031cd195c7aa616e183f0b60; d1b5151231a790c7a60f620e21860593dae9a1c5; 6f8c4311e65efebb9da5a542c0405684e82a77cc; 0e0e706e13f160e74cac9556f28ab9a358c148d2; ccae9fcb1f344e56a3f7cb05a4b49a6e658f9dd2; b1286763413a7b2309edeba1ed18884be429a941; c2f1fbc5e829a8b667470bb4f61698f25210442b; 6e5972640c7492172e636b0b5d644f1f7db2f4e8
    - Continual Instruction-Tuning | papers: d0a21c79996815953f933286d848f11eca42f097; b3f98f5baf3b7239ce0da45147bda4c4154fac9c; 62be538a25a6ca7ebf1b1ac9f338ad01fdc481fb; 879c7942118b781645d183b05ba9a1b6986133fd; 796084a51330777cce4e013726e1b5eba0410cc3; fa133b4200729a57db96ae50aff8c4a5ff819f43; 7021719e050356ddd2f58f40d66e7bab3457ec8c; 1cb37e155e3414ff7774c6c91e72699c35d971c7; 3161e2b6787d304c29dddb7d5fc188ca41be7bda; 28fde851680a40fbbc5c6a44bd3ac6f5ca4ad284; 76b65c248677314865a110424542c220886dbb67; 8d474304a985bfbe838ed3e068710cfb86ead2cf

  - Continual Alignment | papers: d1b5151231a790c7a60f620e21860593dae9a1c5; 6f8c4311e65efebb9da5a542c0405684e82a77cc; 0e0e706e13f160e74cac9556f28ab9a358c148d2; ccae9fcb1f344e56a3f7cb05a4b49a6e658f9dd2; b1286763413a7b2309edeba1ed18884be429a941; c2f1fbc5e829a8b667470bb4f61698f25210442b; 6e5972640c7492172e636b0b5d644f1f7db2f4e8
